title: galium pumilum subsp. atlanticum
intro: Galium pumilum subsp. atlanticum, also known as the Dwarf Bedstraw or Atlantic Bedstraw, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Galium pumilum subsp. atlanticum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
